name: workstream:scope
description: Scope classification and support matrix work

name: workstream:packaging
description: Packaging and distribution work

name: workstream:release
description: Release engineering and compatibility work

name: workstream:readiness
description: Component product-readiness work

name: workstream:a11y
description: Accessibility and behavior verification work

name: workstream:docs
description: Documentation information architecture and consistency

name: workstream:playground
description: Playground and example strategy

name: workstream:governance
description: Governance and external adoption work

name: support:supported
description: Surface committed in v1.0 support baseline

name: support:beta
description: Surface in beta tier — functional but not stability-guaranteed

name: support:experimental
description: Surface in experimental tier — outside support commitment

name: support:rfc-only
description: Specified but not yet implemented surface

name: support:planned
description: Planned/deferred post-1.0 roadmap scope

name: type:bug
description: Confirmed bug in a supported or beta surface

name: type:a11y
description: Accessibility regression or missing a11y attribute

name: type:release-blocker
description: Must be resolved before the next release ships

name: type:docs
description: Documentation gap, error, or improvement

name: type:governance
description: Project process and governance tasks

name: type:community
description: Community feedback or external contributor task

name: type:enhancement
description: New feature or improvement to an existing surface
